Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Huechi Wong, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
